form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (16.88) when second at this track in a P5. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 7th on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Noaki Warrior beaten 4.5 lengths (16.83) in a Grade 5. Has the ability to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room and hit the running rail, shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at this track over 350m. The start prior was at her best with a one length win over 366m at Capalaba. Can't enthuse on this occasion.
